name: Russel Metals Inc.
description: Russel Metals Inc. is one of the largest metals distribution and processing companies in North America. Headquartered in Canada, the company operates through three primary business segments: metals service centers, energy field stores, and steel distributors. It provides a wide range of metal products and value-added processing services to a diverse customer base across Canada and the United States. With a long-standing history in the industry, Russel Metals plays a critical role in the supply chain for various sectors, including construction, energy, and manufacturing, by ensuring the efficient distribution of essential steel and metal materials.
